message:
chore: add CVE arena test results for bd-35a evaluation

Include CVE arena evaluation output from the bd-35a test run, capturing
cargo test output and per-CVE analysis results for the security
regression test suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
